MinecraftConnect.description: Start a WebSocket server and connect to Minecraft Education Edition

world.name: world
world.description: World object (used internally; no need to connect to command nodes)

MinecraftDisconnect.description: Disconnect from Minecraft and shut down the WebSocket server

GetScoreboardObjectives.description: Get the list of all scoreboard objectives

GetScoreboardObjective.description: Get a scoreboard objective by its ID

objective.name: objective
objective.description: Scoreboard objective → connect to SB objective info node

AddScoreboardObjective.description: Add a new objective to the scoreboard

objective.name: objective
objective.description: Added objective → connect to SB objective info node

RemoveScoreboardObjective.description: Remove a scoreboard objective by its ID

GetScores.description: Get all scores for a player

GetScore.description: Get a player's score for a specific objective

OnPlayerChat.description: Fires when a player sends a chat message

sender.name: sender
sender.description: Name of the player who sent the chat

OnPlayerJoin.description: Fires when a player joins the world

player_name.name: player_name
player_name.description: Name of the player who joined

OnPlayerLeave.description: Fires when a player leaves the world

player_name.name: player_name
player_name.description: Name of the player who left

OnPlayerTravelled.description: Fires each time a player moves

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnPlayerTitle.description: Fires when a player receives a title

sender.name: sender
sender.description: Name of the player who sent the title

recipient.name: recipient
recipient.description: Name of the player who received the title

OnPlayerMessage.description: Fires when a player sends any type of message

sender.name: sender
sender.description: Name of the player who sent the message

recipient.name: recipient
recipient.description: [nullable] Recipient name. null for non-tell messages

OnPlayerBounced.description: Fires when a player bounces on a slime block or similar

block.name: block
block.description: BlockType object (block bounced on) → connect to block info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnBlockBroken.description: Fires when a block is broken

block.name: block
block.description: BlockType object → connect to block info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

item.name: item
item.description: [nullable] Held item before breaking. null if bare-handed

OnBlockPlaced.description: Fires when a block is placed

block.name: block
block.description: BlockType object → connect to block info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

item.name: item
item.description: Held item before placing → connect to item info node

OnItemInteracted.description: Fires when a player uses an item

item.name: item
item.description: [nullable] Held item. null if no item

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnItemAcquired.description: Fires when a player acquires an item

item.name: item
item.description: Item type → connect to item type info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnItemCrafted.description: Fires when a player crafts an item

item.name: item
item.description: Item stack (crafted item) → connect to item stack info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnItemEquipped.description: Fires when a player equips an item

item.name: item
item.description: Item stack → connect to item stack info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnItemSmelted.description: Fires when a player smelts an item

item.name: item
item.description: Item type (smelted item) → connect to item type info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

fuel.name: fuel
fuel.description: Item type (fuel item) → connect to item type info node

OnItemTraded.description: Fires when a player completes a villager trade

item.name: item
item.description: Item stack (received item) → connect to item stack info node

villager.name: villager
villager.description: WorldVillager object → connect to villager info node

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

payment_a.name: payment_a
payment_a.description: Item type (payment item A) → connect to item type info node

payment_b.name: payment_b
payment_b.description: [nullable] Item type (payment item B). null if unused

player_xp.name: player_xp
player_xp.description: Emeralds the player holds after trade

villager_xp.name: villager_xp
villager_xp.description: Emeralds the villager holds after trade

OnMobInteracted.description: Fires when a player interacts with a mob

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

OnTargetBlockHit.description: Fires when a target block is hit

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

RunCommand.description: Run any Minecraft command (without the leading /)

IsDaytime.description: Check whether it is currently daytime (time < 12000)

is_day.name: is_day
is_day.description: true if daytime, false if nighttime

FillBlocks.description: Fill a region between two positions with a specified block

done.name: done
done.description: Fires true when fill is complete

GetTopSolidBlock.description: Get the position and type of the topmost solid block

block_name.name: block_name
block_name.description: Name of the topmost solid block

GetPlayerLocation.description: Get the player's current position and facing direction

GetPlayerOrientation.description: Get the player's camera angle (pitch and yaw)

GetPlayerTags.description: Get all tags attached to the player

PlayerHasTag.description: Check whether the player has a specified tag

result.name: result
result.description: true if the player has the tag

GetPlayerLevel.description: Get the player's current experience level

GetGameMode.description: Get the player's current game mode

GetPlayerAbilities.description: Get the player's current ability settings

GetPlayers.description: Get a list of all players in the world

GetFromEntity.description: Extract position, direction, dimension, and other fields from an entity object

entity.name: entity
entity.description: Player or villager object (player / villager output)

GetFromPlayerSnapshot.description: Extract name, color, and entity info from a player snapshot object

player.name: player
player.description: Player object from event node player output

GetFromItemType.description: Extract item ID and data value from an item type object

item.name: item
item.description: Item type (item output from acquire / smelt events)

GetFromItemStack.description: Extract item ID, count, max count, and data value from an item stack object

item.name: item
item.description: Item stack (item output from use / equip / craft / trade events)

GetFromBlockType.description: Extract block ID and data value from a block type object

block.name: block
block.description: Block type object (block / bounce event block output)

GetFromScoreboardObjective.description: Extract the ID and display name from a scoreboard objective object

objective.name: objective
objective.description: Objective from add / get objective node

GetFromMob.description: Extract type, color, and variant numbers from a mob object

mob.name: mob
mob.description: Mob object (mob output from mob interaction event)

GetFromVillager.description: Extract name, rank, and entity info from a villager object

villager.name: villager
villager.description: Villager object (villager output from trade event)

name.name: name
name.description: Localised name (returns input value if not found)

Vector3Distance.description: Calculate the Euclidean distance between two 3D positions

Vector3ToString.description: Convert a position object to an "x y z" formatted string

Vector3Split.description: Split a position object into separate x, y, and z values

ClampNumber.description: Clamp a number between a minimum and maximum value

AABBCreate.description: Create an axis-aligned bounding box (AABB) from two corner positions

AABBIsInside.description: Check whether a position is inside an AABB area

result.name: result
result.description: true if position is inside the area

OnPlayerTransform.description: Fires when a player's position or rotation changes (high frequency)

player.name: player
player.description: WorldPlayer object → connect to player info node

AgentTeleport.description: Teleport the agent to a position (omit to use player's current location)

AgentMoveItem.description: Move items between slots in the agent's inventory

AgentSetItem.description: Set an item in the specified agent inventory slot

AgentCollect.description: Collect a specified item type from around the agent

Vector3Lerp.description: Linearly interpolate between two positions (t=0 is start, t=1 is end)

Vector3Normalize.description: Normalise a vector to unit length (length = 1)

result.name: result
result.description: Unit vector with length 1 {x, y, z}

Vector3Dot.description: Calculate the dot product of two vectors

AABBTranslate.description: Translate an AABB area by a given vector

AABBIntersects.description: Check whether two AABB areas overlap

result.name: result
result.description: true if the two areas overlap

Assert.description: Compare actual vs expected and log PASS/FAIL. Always emits done for chaining.
